Leadership & Manager Consulting

Practical AI leadership support for managers and team leads

Hands-on support for managers and operational leaders who need clear, practical direction on introducing AI in responsible, high-impact ways.

Personalised consultancy for HE leaders and managers

Through personalised, targeted and confidential support we help university leaders and managers improve their team's AI capabilities and overall productivity.

Our HE specialists work closely with you to design a flexible package of support to suit your needs, timescales and budget, whether that's 1:1, workshop-based or a blend.

Using a human-centred approach we help you turn broad institutional ambitions into practical action: where to start, what to standardise, which workflows to prioritise, and how to build confidence across the team without adding unnecessary complexity.

Advisory areas

  • Translating institutional AI policy into team-level practice
  • Identifying quick-win workflows for service improvement
  • Building confident, responsible AI use across teams
  • Designing practical guidance for quality and compliance
  • Evaluating tools and use cases against real team needs
  • Supporting cross-team collaboration on AI-enabled change
  • Creating implementation roadmaps managers can deliver

How we work

  • Practical and context-specific - focused on your team workflow
  • Independent - we have no vendor affiliations
  • Flexible - one-off workshops or ongoing support
  • Collaborative - designed for managers and frontline leaders
  • Higher-education specific - no generic consulting playbooks
  • Fast to mobilise - typically within one week

Leadership Planning Workshops

Structured senior-level workshops that help leadership teams align strategy, governance and implementation priorities for AI.

Workshop

Level

W13. The AI Leadership Briefing (3-hour)

Strategic

W14. The AI Strategic Roadmap (Full day)

Strategic

Typical engagements

Engagements are shaped around practical team needs. Common starting points include a manager-led planning workshop, a workflow redesign sprint for one service area, or implementation support to embed AI into everyday operations in a safe, measurable way.

We regularly work with heads of service, programme leads, department managers and cross-functional project teams to improve consistency, capability and impact. Support is flexible and matched to your priorities, capacity and timeline.

Manager strategy workshop Team implementation planning Policy-in-practice support Cross-department facilitation Workflow improvement design Ongoing advisory support

Let's scope what your team needs

Book a practical scoping call to identify the right starting point for your managers and teams.
